creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Definitely not, they seem to have restructured the directories since I 
submitted the PR.

It looks like its entirely part of MySQLGuiTools now. I'd say this, and 
the other 2 companions ports are going to need some TLC from me/FreeBSD.

I just inherited the port recently after requesting it from ML, so I 
appologize for being slow.

Please close this PR, I'll open a new one that will be substantially 
different.
